: Mars is the Husband. Mars is exalted and is with Rahu, Husband

At the beginning of 2005 -06, since Ketn is in Southern Sign
in Transit, and transits on natal Satnm, she gets the blemish of
Ketn. With this reason, she gets harassment in the Profession.
The reason being, the Ketn transits on the Planets Satnm + Mars
+ Rahu. This also brings estrangement between husband and wife.
